contact.address: 25 Totley Grange Dr, Totley, Sheffield S17 4AH

sample_reviews.author: James H
sample_reviews.text: Core Industry Ltd sorted a nasty leak under our kitchen sink quickly and at a fair price. Really professional service from start to finish.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Had a new boiler fitted by Core Industry and couldn't be happier. They were on time, tidy, and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: David R
sample_reviews.text: Good, reliable plumbers. Came out quickly when we had an emergency and got the job done without any fuss. Will definitely use again.

brand.usp: Core Industry Ltd delivers dependable plumbing and heating services across Sheffield, combining trade expertise with honest, straightforward customer care. From routine maintenance to emergency call-outs, we get the job done right first time.
brand.about_paragraph: I'm a qualified plumber based in Totley, Sheffield, and I founded Core Industry Ltd to bring a genuinely professional standard of plumbing and heating work to homeowners and businesses across the area. Whether you need a new boiler, a bathroom refit, or an urgent repair, I take pride in turning up on time, working cleanly, and leaving every job to the highest standard. My customers trust me to be honest about what's needed — and that's a reputation I work hard to keep.
